Motion For Order To Re-Open Discovery; Supplement To Motion For Re-Open Discovery
Off Calendar Oct-24-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion to re-open discovery:
Granted in part and denied in part. The motion to conduct further written discovery is denied. The Court finds good cause to re-open discovery for the limited purpose of conducting the depositions of Evaristo Rocha, Mercedes Leon, Jay Nazzai, and Aida Sandoval. The taking of said depositions is contingent upon counsel for plaintiff providing current contact information and any statements of the witnesses identified as Rivera and Ramirez, with any attorney work product redacted, by October 26, 2005 and scheduling said depositions. The Court further orders plaintiff to meet and confer as to scheduling the deposition of Lew Grill. The deposition is to be completed on or before November 7, 2005. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
